name: 「胧村正」
icon: slashblade:slashblade[slashblade:blade_state={attackAmplifier: 0.0f, comboRoot: "slashblade:standby", model: "last_smith:model/named/smith/model.obj", slashArtsKey: "slashblade:judgement_cut", carryType: "pso2", effectColor: -13421569, effectColorInverse: 0b, texture: "last_smith:model/named/muramasa/texture_oboro.png", adjust: [0.0d,0.0d,0.0d], baseAttackModifier: 5.0f, broken: 0b, defaultBewitched: 0b, sealed: 0b, killCount: 0, proudSoul: 0, translationKey: "item.last_smith.oboro_muramasa", refine: 0, specialEffects: []}]

pages.text: 「胧村正」是千子村正所锻造的最后一振妖刀。$(br2)正如其名，是一振能斩断世间因果报应的朦胧之刃。$(br2)因此，千子村正的执念终于被斩断，得以成佛……
这一振刀据说后来被一位叛变的忍者所持有。那名忍者带着这振刀周游世界，降妖除魔。$(br2)“妖刀村正”的传说，便这样结束了。
